budgetPolicy: Outer runtime-service, job, MatchSet, and browser proof budgets may be tuned from evidence; deterministic per-Strategy caps remain unchanged.

budgets.evidence: Uses existing deterministic per-call runtime timeout/cap behavior; not loosened for Python exhibition latency.
budgets.scope: Single Strategy method call inside the selected runtime implementation.

budgets.evidence: v1.19 proved whole-Match Python exhibitions need a larger outer HTTP budget than individual Strategy calls.
budgets.scope: Whole Match execution through runtime-service, including repeated Strategy calls.

budgets.evidence: Used to distinguish queued/running/slow/degraded states from runtime Strategy violations.
budgets.scope: Bounded local proof window for MatchSet jobs, retries, status refresh, and replay availability.

budgets.evidence: Backed by COWARDS_RUNTIME_SERVICE_HTTP_TIMEOUT_MS and classified as retryable system failure on timeout.
budgets.scope: HTTP request from Go backend to runtime-service for one Match.

budgets.evidence: v1.20 proof remains bounded to three cycles and is not a stress test.
budgets.scope: Bounded signed-in browser proof covering account, revisions, exhibitions, result, and replay pages.
